results.title: Israel says Iran launched missiles at it in first such bombardment since fragile ceasefire
results.description: JERUSALEM (AP) — Iran launched missiles at Israel in the first such bombardment since a fragile ceasefire took effect in early April, raising the possibility of a return to heavy fighting and compli...

results.title: Bernie Sanders Opposes Proposed US-Israel Military Cooperation Measure
results.description:
Washington (HRNW) – US Senator Bernie Sanders has announced his opposition to a provision under consideration in Congress that he says would expand military cooperation between the United States and Israel while increasing financial obligations for American taxpayers. In a statement posted on social media platform X, Sanders argued that the proposal would effectively channel...

The post Bernie Sanders Opposes Proposed US-Israel Military Cooperation Measure first appeared on Human Rights News Worldwide .
results.source: Human Rights News Worldwide Hrnw News Agency

results.title: Ex-Nato chief's chilling warning to Starmer... spend now on defence or Britain will pay a 'cost in blood'
results.description: Former Nato chief General Sir Richard Shirreff said the country could suffer 'catastrophic costs' unless the Government moves to shore up our defences immediately.

results.title: Cockroach Janta Party Protest | डिजिटल आंदोलन
results.description: क्रॉक्रोच जनता पार्टीने (सीजेपी) नीट व सीबीएसई परीक्षांच्या पेपरफुटीच्या निषेधार्थ दिल्लीतील जंतर-मंतरवर दिवसभर धरणे धरले, निदर्शने केली, घोषणा दिल्या आणि केंद्रीय शिक्षणमंत्री धर्मेंद्र प्रधान यांच्या राजीनाम्याची मागणी केली. सीजेपीची कल्पनाच मुळात भारताचे सरन्यायाधीश सूर्य कांत यांनी केलेल्या टीपणीतून झाली.
